THE SITUATION IN THE UNITED STATES (Source: "MORBIDITY AND MORTALITY-WEEKLY REPORT", U.S. National Office of Vital Statistics): Number of reported cases for the current week (previous week in parentheses):

The situation with reference to influenza in the United States did not change materially last week. Sporadic cases, very few of which were confirmed by laboratory tests, and a few localized outbreaks characterized the occurrence during this period. Widespread occurence appeared to be present in only 1 State. Conneticut and Massachusetts state that sporadic unconfirmed cases are being reported. In both upstate New York and the city of New York, small outbreaks have been reported.
EPIDEMIC REPORT: Streptococcal sore throat - Nfld. Reports an epidemic at Calvert and Ferrtland
